existing_features.title: Redesign the Services section to display tarot reading service cards in a clean, card-based layout matching the reference images. Each service card must include: a circular icon or badge (Mini Readings icon), the service title in a serif font (e.g., '1 Question Reading'), a brief description below the title, the price prominently displayed (₹199, ₹299, etc.), and 'per session' label. Cards should have rounded corners, subtle borders, and ample padding.

Group services by category with section headers. Display 'Mini Readings' as a section with its own badge/icon, followed by individual service cards (1 Question Reading, 3 Card Reading, etc.). Add similar sections for 'Premium / In-Depth Readings' and other service categories if applicable. Each section header should match the style from the reference images.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update service section to match specified format

projectName: Update Services section layout to match reference format
